Related Entities

  • hospital LAKE HEALTH 3-star overall rating
  • hospital WINDSOR LAURELWOOD CENTER FOR BEHAVORIAL MEDICINE
  • snf HOMESTEAD II 3-star, 46 beds
  • snf KIRTLAND WOODS OF JOURNEY 1-star, 177 beds
  • snf Willoughby Post Acute 3-star, 157 beds
  • snf MADISON HEALTH CARE 2-star, 125 beds
  • snf WICKLIFFE COUNTRY PLACE 3-star, 170 beds

  • snf CARDINAL WOODS SKILLED NURSING & REHAB CTR 1-star, 120 beds
  • snf Mentor Hills Post Acute 2-star, 147 beds
  • snf EMBASSY OF PAINESVILLE 4-star, 78 beds

Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
